_notes: Source tk-soft-observation has constraints tk-obs-1(error)/tk-obs-2(error), extensions deviceUsed/bodyPosition/observationMethod, code with extensible binding tk-soft VS, code.coding with system/code min=1 (no slicing), identifier not constrained, performer min=1 targetProfile=[tk-soft/Practitioner, tk-soft/Organization], value[x] types=[Quantity,CodeableConcept,string]. Target iit-proj-observation has constraints iit-obs-1(error)/iit-obs-2(error)/iit-obs-3(warning), extensions studyTimepoint[1..1]/dataQualityFlag/queryStatus, identifier mandatory min=1 with system/value required, code.coding slicing with loinc[1..1] mandatory, performer banned (max=0), value[x] adds integer/boolean, category adds studyEndpoint slice.

drifts.description: Constraints removed in target: [tk-obs-1, tk-obs-2]
New error constraint added in target: iit-obs-1 (Research observations must have a LOINC code)
New error constraint added in target: iit-obs-2 (Final observations must have a value or dataAbsentReason)
New warning constraint added in target: iit-obs-3 (Quantitative results should include units)
Cardinality changed: [0..*] -> [1..*] and MustSupport added in target
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1] and MustSupport added in target
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1] and MustSupport added in target
MustSupport added on existing slice 'laboratory' in target
MustSupport added on existing slice 'vitalSigns' in target
New MustSupport slice 'studyEndpoint' added in target (0..1, MustSupport=true). Supports clinical trial study endpoint categorization; no equivalent slice in source profile.
Binding removed in target: extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/observation-code) -> none
Slicing added in target: discriminator=[{type:pattern, path:$this}], rules=open
New mandatory slice 'loinc' added in target: [1..1] (mustSupport)
Cardinality changed: [1..1] -> [0..1] and MustSupport removed in target (constraints moved into loinc slice)
Cardinality changed: [1..1] -> [0..1] and MustSupport removed in target (constraints moved into loinc slice)
Reference target profile changed: [https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient] -> [https://iit-proj.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient]
Reference target profile changed: [https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Encounter] -> [https://iit-proj.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Encounter]
Cardinality changed: [1..*] -> [0..0] (element banned in target)
MustSupport removed in target (element banned: max=0)
Type changed: [Quantity, CodeableConcept, string] -> [Quantity, CodeableConcept, string, integer, boolean] (integer and boolean added)
MustSupport added in target on optional element (was not constrained in source)
Binding removed in target: extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/body-site) -> none (element no longer constrained in target)
Binding removed in target: extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/observation-method) -> none (element no longer constrained in target)
MustSupport removed in target (element no longer constrained in target)
Extension removed in target profile: Observation.extension:deviceUsed (was mustSupport)
Extension removed in target profile: Observation.extension:bodyPosition (was mustSupport)
Extension removed in target profile: Observation.extension:observationMethod (was mustSupport)
Extension added in target profile: Observation.extension:studyTimepoint [1..1] (mandatory, mustSupport)
Extension added in target profile: Observation.extension:dataQualityFlag (mustSupport)
Extension added in target profile: Observation.extension:queryStatus (mustSupport)
